payload.prompt: Edit the reference wedding morning gift set product photo. Preserve the same square crop and scene: cream vanity table, blush florals, gold vanity mirror, champagne ribbon, gift box, gift note, and soft luxury wedding-morning light. Change only the personalized products from wood to mirror/glass: the large arched Avery piece, smaller Bridesmaid piece, and square foreground stack should look like reflective glass or mirror keepsakes with polished clear edges and gold script/floral details. Remove wood grain and plywood/tan wood from the product pieces. Photorealistic premium product photography. No logos, no watermark, no extra people.
